rounds.name: Round 1 · 连接词
rounds.description: 转折 / 并列 / 因果 / 对比 / 让步 / 总结

tokens.v: I think the better source depends on what you are buying. Claire and Paul both pick one side
it fits all purchases,
the real line runs between standard products and personal products.
standard goods — phones, laptops, batteries, rice cookers — online reviews clearly win. These products have clear numbers
the same version goes to every buyer,
the more reviews you read, the closer you get to the truth. My friend has only used one phone; a review website has data from ten thousand users.

speed and volume both point to the internet.
For personal goods — shoes, clothes, skin care, a birthday gift — friends win by a wide margin. Running shoes fit differently on every foot,

a thousand strangers' ratings tell me very little about my own. A roommate who has jogged with me for a year can pick the right pair in ten minutes. The same logic holds for gifts: a stranger's review cannot know my mother's taste; my sister can.
the fair answer is
either-or
which-for-what: online for the standard, friends for the personal.
